core_layout.description: The high-density grid container using CSS Grid. Implements the 'Topological Layout' dividing the screen into the Diagnostic HUD, Sidebar, Main Canvas, and Right-Pane Manifold.
Polymorphic navigation rail utilizing implicit state via Context. Supports 'Standard Navigation' and 'Action Triggers'.
Top-level HUD displaying system pulse. Renders 'Vectors Loaded', 'Unindexed Points', and 'Active JAX Version' using high-contrast text.
The primary navigation and action router. Elevated to handle all major transitions via Ctrl+K.

monitor_engine.description: The Sovereign Data Handler. Manages the WebSocket connection to the Telemetry Proxy. Performs 'Axiom 2' schematic checks on incoming JAX data.
Renders the 'Hamiltonian Norm' and 'Rho Max' curves. Uses SVG <path> elements with feGaussianBlur filters to visualize 'Explosion' events.
A consolidated abstraction layer for all visual signals. Manages GhostTracerOverlay, Schematic Toasts, and Runtime Warnings under a single z-index strategy.

remedial_manifold.description: Consolidated view replacing separate 'Friction Stream' and 'Binary Guard' tabs. Uses a 'Lens' toggle to switch data sources while maintaining layout.
The 'Right Pane' action space. Orchestrates the comparison between broken code and KEL 'Golden Standard' fixes.
Visualizes the reliability of a historical fix. Displays similarity score, historical occurrences, and resolution rate.

temporal_and_axiomatic.description: A horizontal timeline tracking scan start, anomalies, warnings, and interventions. Provides temporal context to spatial data.
Real-time validator for system axioms. Shows satisfied/violated states for 'Sanitization', 'Intent Consistency', etc.

telescope_system.description: The 'Deep Dive' view. Uses render props to dynamically inject either 'AI Analysis' or 'Raw Code' views based on the inspection context.

utilities_and_hooks.description: Manages SSE connection. Implements 'Pause/Scrub' buffer logic.
Strict discriminated unions for 'HEARTBEAT', 'DATA_POINT', and 'ANOMALY' events.
Generated file from the backend pipeline containing strictly typed SVG paths.
